name: Iran Nuclear Program & HEU Custody Architecture
summary: Created 2026-05-12. **A1 TRUMP PUBLICLY OPENED HEU-VIA-CHINA CUSTODIAN DOOR AT TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 1**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). **MATERIAL POLICY SIGNAL — substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian on Day 15 of 21 Russia-track window** (US officials had reportedly ruled out Russia-as-custodian per multiple May reports). Framework remains stalled on substance — Iran's HEU return-clause demand and Trump's text-light approach unchanged — but **public custodian door now re-opened in different jurisdiction**. Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role. **B5 IRAN'S AMBASSADOR TO CHINA PUBLICLY FRAMED BEIJING AS 'POLITICAL BALANCING' PARTNER** (Tasnim primary + CBS amplification CONFIRMED RHETORIC): 'China had paved the way for previous direct U.S.-Iran peace talks in Islamabad'; 'predicted Beijing could emerge as a key player in ongoing diplomacy' — institutional ground laid in Iranian state media for exactly the HEU-via-China structure Trump opened. **Diplomatic architecture pivot from Russia-track-stalled to China-track-opening visible from BOTH sides.** Russia structurally sidelined; Pravda silent. PRIOR (May 13): Iranian Parliament National Security and Foreign Policy Commission spokesperson Ebrahim Rezaei said May 12 (Mehr News / Iran International / Tabnak / Euronews / Al Bawaba): '90 percent enrichment may be one of Iran's available options if the country is subjected to another attack' — FIRST TIME IN CYCLE a sitting Iranian parliamentary spokesperson has publicly named weapons-grade enrichment as a retaliatory threshold. Current stated ceiling is 60% with ~440 kg stockpile; 90% line is the breakout-to-bomb threshold. Critically: CONDITIONAL on a future attack, NOT an order or confirmed change to operational policy — but it REFRAMES YESTERDAY'S HEU-WITH-RETURN-CLAUSE CONCESSION: the Parliament is publicly walking up the escalation ladder at the same time the executive is offering custody flexibility through Pakistan. Tasnim ran on-record source: 'No one in Iran drafts plans to please Trump' — rejecting US 'garbage' framing. IRNA carried Pezeshkian 'talks are not surrender.' The Tasnim-IRNA-Parliament axis is now UNIFORMLY DEFIANT rather than divergent (opposite of April pattern when Tasnim was hawkish and IRNA more measured). Iran International (opposition-leaning, Saudi-funded) amplifying Rezaei quote at face value — serves both Iranian-state escalation messaging AND opposition narrative of regime irrationality. Deputy Labour Minister Mohammadi publicly admitted >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted from war — Tehran is publicly admitting domestic-economic deterioration AND publicly hardening on nuclear file at the SAME TIME. Classical regime-survival externalisation playbook now visible. No US (Trump/WH) response to Rezaei threat as of May 13 morning. Netanyahu 60 Minutes Sunday 'go in and take it out' position structurally aligned with Israeli hawk camp. **THE NUCLEAR FILE REMAINS THE CENTRAL DIPLOMATIC AXIS OF THE CYCLE — but hardening rhetoric narrows landing zone from both ends.** Persistent policy axis covering Iran's nuclear program, enrichment infrastructure, HEU stockpile custody architecture, and the US/Israel/IAEA/Russia inter-state framework around it. **B2 IRAN'S MAY 10-11 COUNTER-PROPOSAL CONTAINED THE FIRST HEU CONCESSION OF THE CYCLE (REPORTED via WSJ primary): dilute portion of HEU stockpile under IAEA supervision + transfer remainder to A THIRD COUNTRY, but with explicit RETURN CLAUSE demanding HEU returnability if US exits any future deal — AND explicitly REJECTING dismantling of enrichment facilities.** The HEU return-clause is the structural sticking point: real concession on PHYSICAL custody but hard floor against permanent commitment. Russia (Putin May 9 standing offer) is the implicit third-country candidate but no party publicly named it. **TRUMP PUBLICLY REJECTED THE COUNTER-PROPOSAL AS 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE'** — HEU-transfer-with-return-clause now in rejection state, framework on 'massive life support.' **B5 NETANYAHU CBS 60 MINUTES MAY 11: war 'NOT OVER' until URANIUM REMOVED + ENRICHMENT SITES DISMANTLED + PROXIES NEUTRALIZED — 'YOU GO IN AND YOU TAKE IT OUT.'** Haaretz framed Netanyahu's uranium-removal demand as 'his lifeline' = domestic political survival, not strategic necessity. **B7 NEW OFAC SANCTIONS WAVE MAY 11-12 INCLUDED IRANIAN NUCLEAR RESEARCH WITH POSSIBLE MILITARY APPLICATIONS.** **THE NUCLEAR FILE IS NOW THE CENTRAL DIPLOMATIC AXIS OF THE CYCLE.** Markets pricing nuclear-energy-security premium as durable: URA +3.7% 1D / +12.3% 1M / +10.6% 3M — outperforming both gold (-0.7% 1M) and oil (+6.3% 1M). **Vali Nasr framework: Iranians want 'meticulously detailed agreement with verification'; Trump wants no detailed document — wants to declare everything solved. The WSJ HEU-with-return-clause IS the meticulous Iranian counter-detail Nasr predicted.** Suzanne Maloney (Brookings): JCPOA 2015 was 159 dense pages — 'very hard to get to anything similar in a matter of days.'

current.iran_heu_concession_status: REPORTED (WSJ primary); REJECTED by Trump publicly May 10-11
current.russia_custodian_status: Standing offer (Putin May 9) UNCONVERTED into named framework; implicit but unnamed candidate
current.iaea_role: Supervision of dilute-portion only per Iranian terms
current.israel_position: Maximalist — Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes 'war not over until uranium removed and enrichment sites dismantled'

active_triggers.condition: Russia formally named as HEU custodian for Iran transfer under any framework agreement within 30 days (by 2026-06-11)
US or Israel strike on Iran enrichment facility (Natanz, Fordow, Arak) — confirmed kinetic
Iran withdraws HEU return-clause from any revised counter-proposal — would signal real commitment shift
Iran resumes enrichment to weapons-grade levels (>20% U-235) publicly — signals walk-away from non-proliferation envelope

recent_signals.headline: A12 IRAN TONE HARDENING ON NUCLEAR FILE — Iranian Parliament NSFP Commission spokesperson Ebrahim Rezaei publicly named 90% enrichment as retaliatory threshold if Iran is struck again (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NOT ACTION); first time in cycle a sitting Iranian parliamentary spokesperson has publicly named weapons-grade enrichment as a tripwire. Current stated ceiling 60% with ~440 kg stockpile; 90% = breakout threshold. Mehr News + Tabnak + Euronews + Iran International + Tasnim + Al Bawaba all amplified without editorial softening = Iranian state-media system permitted weapons-grade rhetoric as sanctioned policy signal, not leaked outlier. Tasnim on-record source: 'No one in Iran drafts plans to please Trump.' IRNA + Tasnim + Parliament now uniformly defiant (vs April's IRNA-Tasnim divergence pattern). The 90% rhetoric REFRAMES yesterday's HEU-with-return-clause concession: Parliament walking up escalation ladder while executive offers custody flexibility through Pakistan. Iranian Deputy Labour Minister Mohammadi publicly admitted >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted — Tehran publicly admitting domestic economic deterioration AND publicly hardening on nuclear file simultaneously = classical regime-survival externalisation playbook. NO US (Trump/WH) response to Rezaei threat as of May 13 morning. Netanyahu 60 Minutes Sunday 'go in and take it out' structurally aligned with Israeli hawk camp. URA -5.0% 1D (first material correction of cleanest decoupled long thesis) = market trimming on RHETORIC vs ACTION distinction; no fresh HEU news, no Russia custodian announcement (Day 14 of 21 post-Putin-Araghchi window) = catalyst gap.
sources: Euronews 'Iran threatens 90% enrichment as talks falter'
Jerusalem Post citing NYT '2 million jobs lost'
recent_signals.verification: Rezaei 90% enrichment statement = CONFIRMED RHETORIC NOT ACTION (Iran state media + opposition + Western press) — conditional on future attack, NOT enrichment-policy change; Tasnim 'no one drafts plans to please Trump' = CONFIRMED Iranian-state primary; IRNA/Tasnim/Parliament synchronisation = CONFIRMED multi-channel; Mohammadi labour-ministry job-loss admission = CONFIRMED (NYT/JPost relay); URA -5.0% = CONFIRMED tape (yfinance) — positioning unwind, not thesis falsification.

recent_signals.headline: IRAN'S MAY 10-11 COUNTER-PROPOSAL CONTAINED FIRST HEU CONCESSION OF CYCLE — dilute portion under IAEA + transfer remainder to third country, but WITH EXPLICIT RETURN CLAUSE demanding HEU returnability if US exits future deal AND explicitly REJECTING dismantling of enrichment facilities (REPORTED — WSJ primary). Russia (Putin May 9) implicit candidate but unnamed. **TRUMP REJECTED PUBLICLY ('TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE' / 'garbage' / '1% chance of living').** Netanyahu CBS 60 Minutes May 11: war 'not over' until uranium removed + enrichment sites dismantled — 'you go in and you take it out.' New OFAC sanctions May 12 targeted Iranian nuclear research with military applications. **THE NUCLEAR FILE IS NOW THE CENTRAL DIPLOMATIC AXIS OF THE CYCLE.** URA +3.7% 1D / +12.3% 1M = markets pricing nuclear-energy-security premium as durable. Nasr framework: Iranians want 'meticulously detailed agreement with verification'; Trump wants no detailed document. WSJ HEU-with-return-clause IS the meticulous Iranian counter-detail. Maloney: JCPOA 2015 was 159 dense pages — very hard in matter of days.
sources: Bloomberg + Reuters + IRNA + Tasnim + Press TV + Al Jazeera + NPR (amplification)
Brookings Suzanne Maloney 'The Third Islamic Republic'
recent_signals.verification: Iran HEU concession with return clause = REPORTED (WSJ primary single-source on full terms; Iran-side separately corroborated via IRNA/Tasnim; amplification cascade real); Trump rejection = CONFIRMED multi-source primary; Netanyahu 60 Minutes statements = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (broadcast primary); OFAC nuclear-research designations May 12 = CONFIRMED (Treasury primary); Russia custodian path = REPORTED (Pravda + Iran International) but unnamed in Iranian counter-proposal
